title: Lead Revenue Manager at Pugmarks India

jsonLd.title: Lead Revenue Manager at Pugmarks India
jsonLd.description:
We at Pugmarks India are looking for an experienced Revenue Manager based out of Bhopal. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Pugmarks India:
Pugmarks India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in F&B Service

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pugmarks India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
